title: Quadlet build generation does not allow systemd specifiers for file path
body:
### Issue Description

If you use a [systemd specifier](https://www.freedesktop.org/software/systemd/man/latest/systemd.unit.html#Specifiers) in a `[Build]` section, `File` key, then Quadlet generation fails.

Systemd specifiers work correctly for other Quadlet types (e.g. [Volume]).

The source of this issue can be found here:

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/pkg/systemd/quadlet/quadlet.go#L1428

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Create the Quadlet file `example.build`:
```
[Build]
ImageTag=localhost/example
File=%h/images/example.Containerfile
```
2. Observe that the service file is not created upon daemon reload
3. Observe the error produced via `podman-system-generator -dryrun -v | grep example.Containerfile`


### Describe the results you received

```
quadlet-generator[1824002]: converting "example.build": relative path in File key requires SetWorkingDirectory key to be set
quadlet-generator[1824002]: processing encountered some errors
```

### Describe the results you expected

Quadlet generation should succeed.

### podman info output

```yaml
$> podman-system-generator -version
5.5.1



$> podman version
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      5.5.1
API Version:  5.5.1
Go Version:   go1.24.4
Git Commit:   850db76dd78a0641eddb9ee19ee6f60d2c59bcfa
Built:        Mon Jun  9 12:25:40 2025
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
